issues.title: #1: Timing window: stop_run_result evaluated AFTER _run_retry ad
issues.invariant: Time-based stop predicates must be evaluated before retry state is committed to capture current elapsed time.

issues.title: #2: No assertion that retry_state.outcome is non-None when predi
issues.invariant: Retry predicates must only be called when retry_state.outcome is non-None

issues.title: #3: retry_error_callback exception handling undefined. If callba
issues.invariant: User-provided callback exceptions must be caught to prevent uncaught propagation to iter() callers

issues.title: #4: Thread-local cache corruption: self._local.statistics = copy
issues.invariant: Thread-local storage must not be synchronized across instances to maintain per-thread isolation in concurrent scenarios

issues.title: #5: iter_state.reset() clears actions at iteration start. If act
issues.invariant: State reset should occur between retry attempts, not on every iter() call, to prevent callbacks with side effects from re-executing

issues.title: #6: Returns None if outcome_timestamp unset. Stored in statistic
issues.invariant: seconds_since_start property must return a numeric value in all cases, not None, to prevent TypeError crashes in stop predicates that perform delay calculations.

issues.title: #7: TryAgain exception forces retry by setting is_explicit_retry
issues.invariant: Stop conditions must apply to all retries, including explicit TryAgain retries

issues.title: #8: Statistics state inconsistent during exceptions. If copy(f,
issues.invariant: Statistics reference must only be assigned after the wrapped call completes successfully, preventing torn state visibility during concurrent access when exceptions occur.

issues.title: #9: retry_state exposed to caller via AttemptManager. User code
issues.invariant: Internal retry state must be private to prevent caller code from directly corrupting state via public attribute access.

issues.title: #10: NO_RESULT = object() defined but never referenced. Dead code
issues.invariant: Unused module-level definitions should not persist in production code

issues.title: #11: Never called, but broken: Future.set_exception() (from concu
issues.invariant: Future.set_exception() requires an exception instance, not an exc_info tuple

issues.title: #12: When is_explicit_retry=True, _run_retry is not called, so it
issues.invariant: State field must accurately represent actual behavior: retry_run_result must be True whenever a retry occurs, independent of code path taken (exception-triggered vs explicit flag)

issues.title: #13: _run_wait (wait computation) always runs before _run_stop (s
issues.invariant: Wait computation must only execute if stop condition is false

issues.title: #14: wrapped_f.retry = self stores reference to Retrying instance
issues.invariant: Wrapped functions must not hold strong references to their Retrying instance, as this couples the wrapped function's lifecycle to the retry object and prevents proper garbage collection when retry_with() creates copies.

issues.title: #15: prepare_for_next_attempt() called BEFORE self.sleep(do). If
issues.invariant: State mutation must not precede potentially-blocking operations; sleep exceptions must not corrupt retry_state by leaving it pre-incremented

issues.title: #16: No thread-safety guarantee on outcome mutations. Two threads
issues.invariant: Concurrent outcome mutations must be protected by a lock

issues.title: #Meta-Law: Impossible Triplet: OVERCLAIM / FALSIFIED
issues.invariant: Exception handler must not over-specify the condition for exception recording by redundantly checking both exc_type and exc_value when exc_type alone is sufficient and guaranteed non-None when an exception occurs.

issues.title: #A: wrapped_f.statistics is a function attribute, SHARED across
issues.invariant: Mutable statistics must not be stored in function attributes shared across threads; thread-local access via decorator instance ensures concurrent safety

issues.title: #B: Misnamed. Value is OVERWRITTEN each iteration with current a
issues.invariant: Timing metrics overwritten each iteration must not have names implying accumulation.

issues.title: #C: All user callbacks (before, after, before_sleep, retry_error
#D: retry_state is public attribute on AttemptManager. User code
#1: Stop checked after wait; wait computed even if stop will be
issues.invariant: Stop condition must be evaluated immediately before computing wait time, not via separate prior action.

issues.title: #2: Analysis claimed outcome could be None
issues.invariant: outcome must be non-None before accessing its exception() method in error-handling path

issues.title: #3: Callback exception uncaught
issues.invariant: Callback exceptions must propagate to the caller, not be silently suppressed by broad exception handling.

issues.title: #4: Analysis: thread-local corruption
issues.invariant: Thread-local iteration state must be reset when each retry attempt begins to prevent action accumulation from previous retries.

issues.title: #5: Analysis: double-queueing possible
issues.invariant: Synchronization lock must be initialized in constructor before concurrent access, not lazily during exception handling

issues.title: #6: Returns None when outcome_timestamp unset
issues.invariant: seconds_since_start must return None when outcome_timestamp is unset, not a synthetic elapsed time

issues.title: #7: TryAgain bypasses stop_after_attempt
issues.invariant: TryAgain exceptions must be suppressed only if the stop condition has not been met; otherwise the exception must propagate to terminate retries

issues.title: #8: Exception during copy leaves wrapped_f.statistics partial
#9: retry_state exposed; user can corrupt
issues.invariant: Internal mutable state must use name mangling to prevent direct user access

issues.title: #10: NO_RESULT = object() never used
#11: Never called; broken exc_info handling
issues.invariant: Never-called Future.construct classmethod must be invoked to centralize Future initialization and ensure consistent exc_info handling

issues.title: #12: Flag hides that retry_run_result not set for TryAgain
issues.invariant: When TryAgain exception is caught, retry_run_result flag must be set to indicate an explicit retry attempt.

issues.title: #13: Wait computed before stop check
issues.invariant: Stop condition must be checked once before computing wait time, not earlier as part of retry-state classification

issues.title: #14: wrapped_f.retry stores reference; multiple calls accumulate
issues.invariant: Wrapped functions must not store references to mutable decorator instances that accumulate state across invocations

issues.title: #15: State mutated before sleep; if sleep raises, pre-incremented
#16: No thread-safety on outcome mutations; races possible
issues.invariant: Outcome mutations must be protected by a reentrant lock to ensure thread-safe atomic updates across all callers

issues.title: #18: statistics dict is mutable; concurrent calls to same instanc
issues.invariant: Each retry attempt must have its own independent statistics dictionary to prevent concurrent threads from racing on shared mutable state

issues.title: #B (misleading name): MEDIUM
issues.invariant: Elapsed time for each retry attempt must be measured from when that specific attempt starts, not from the beginning of all retries
